name: Sinostar Cable Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinostar Cable Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells wires and cables, and its accessories. The company's products include power cables, electrical equipment wires and cables, bare wires, special cables, and cable accessories. Its products are used in electric power, energy, coal, transportation, petroleum, petrochemical, national defense, urban construction, and other fields. Sinostar Cable Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Yixing, China.
